stem.rawText:
Place the following integrals in order of size, starting with the smallest.

                                                 1

                                                 ³
                                                         x
                                            Pൌ 2             dx
                                                 0


                                                 1

                                                              x
                                            Rൌ
                                                 0

solution.rawText:
We do not know how to integrate any of these, so we will instead compare the integrands as the
integrals are all from 0 to 1.
           √ x
We have      2 = 2x/2 , which makes R look a little simpler. Since x/2 < x for 0 < x < 1,
2x/2 < 2x in this interval, and so R < Q.
                                       √                        √
Now in this interval, we also have x < x (as x2 < x), so 2x < 2 x , hence Q < P .
Combining these, we find that R < Q < P , so the correct option is F.
